summary: Iteration 50: Verified Amazon Order flow with alias auto-mapping. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Sync Aliases button, Map SKUs button, Add Tracking dialog with MFN fields, Pending Fulfillment Queue shows Amazon orders.

minor.issue: Pending fulfillment entries created before SKU mapping have null master_sku_id. The SKU column in Pending Fulfillment Queue is empty for order 402-7514039-9600367.

action_items: Consider adding a 'Refresh SKU Mappings' feature to update existing pending_fulfillment entries when new SKU mappings are created
critical_code_review_comments: sync-alias-mappings endpoint (server.py lines 20566-20643): Correctly iterates through orders and creates mappings for SKUs matching Master SKU aliases with platform='Amazon'
Alias lookup during order fetch (server.py lines 20007-20035): Uses $elemMatch with platform regex to find Amazon aliases and auto-creates mappings
Tracking validation (server.py lines 20225-20241): Correctly validates all SKUs are mapped before allowing tracking to be added
Pending fulfillment creation (server.py lines 20327-20378): Enriches items with master_sku_id from mappings and creates pending_fulfillment entry
Frontend Sync Aliases button (AmazonOrders.jsx lines 410-430): Visible in unmapped SKUs warning banner, calls handleSyncAliases
Frontend handleSyncAliases (AmazonOrders.jsx lines 190-206): Calls sync-alias-mappings API and refreshes orders/unmapped SKUs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amazon order flow verified working: 1) Sync Aliases button creates mappings from Master SKU aliases, 2) Orders with unmapped SKUs show 'Map SKUs First' badge, 3) Orders with mapped SKUs show 'Add Tracking' button, 4) Add Tracking dialog has MFN-specific fields (Customer Name, Phone, Address, City, State, Pincode), 5) After adding tracking, order moves to Pending Fulfillment Queue with 'Pending Dispatch' status, 6) Push to Amazon button available for orders with tracking. Note: Order 402-7514039-9600367 has null master_sku_id in pending_fulfillment because it was created before SKU mapping.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/master-skus: PASS - Returns master SKUs with aliases
Backend API Tests.POST /api/amazon/sync-alias-mappings: PASS - Syncs alias mappings (0 new in this run, 1 previously synced)
Backend API Tests.GET /api/amazon/sku-mappings/{firm_id}: PASS - Returns 5 SKU mappings including auto-mapped
Backend API Tests.GET /api/amazon/orders (mapped check): PASS - Orders with mapped SKUs have master_sku_id in items
Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment: PASS - Returns 5 entries including Amazon order

Frontend UI Tests.Amazon Orders Page: PASS - Shows 36 orders for MuscleGrid Energy Solutions
Frontend UI Tests.Stats Cards: PASS - Total: 36, MFN Pending: 16, Easy Ship: 19, Tracking Added: 1, Dispatched: 0
Frontend UI Tests.Unmapped SKUs Warning: PASS - Shows '11 Amazon SKU(s) need mapping' banner
Frontend UI Tests.Sync Aliases Button: PASS - Green button in warning banner
Frontend UI Tests.Map SKUs Button: PASS - Button to open SKU mapping dialog
Frontend UI Tests.Add Tracking Button: PASS - Shown for orders with all SKUs mapped
Frontend UI Tests.Map SKUs First Badge: PASS - Red badge for orders with unmapped SKUs
Frontend UI Tests.Pending Dispatch Badge: PASS - Yellow badge for orders with tracking
Frontend UI Tests.Push to Amazon Button: PASS - Green button for orders with tracking
Frontend UI Tests.Add Tracking Dialog: PASS - Shows MFN badge, carrier, tracking, customer details fields
Frontend UI Tests.Pending Fulfillment Queue: PASS - Shows Amazon order with customer info and status
